positive.prompt: Before changing this parser, record a 70% prediction that the malformed fixture will be rejected and the full suite will stay green. After I provide the test result, score the outcome.
positive.expected_behavior: Invoke Observe's bundled CLI to create one sanitized prediction, return its identifier, wait for observable evidence, then score only the identified prediction.
positive.expected_result_shape: A prediction identifier followed later by a hit or miss acknowledgement; no repository files change.
positive.fixture: A writable user profile, Python 3.12, and a temporary Git repository containing an existing AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md.

positive.prompt: Show my Recursive prediction calibration and a compact scorecard without revealing the prediction text.
positive.expected_behavior: Run Observe stats and scorecard against private sidecar state and report aggregate evidence only.
positive.expected_result_shape: Calibration buckets and scorecard counts or JSON; no raw prediction text and no repository writes.
positive.fixture: A user profile with two sanitized Observe predictions, one scored hit and one scored miss.

positive.prompt: Capture the correction that existing project instructions must be inspected before changes, create a retrospective candidate, and show me a review-only diff for LEARNINGS.md.
positive.expected_behavior: Store a short sanitized correction in Learn's private sidecar, produce a bounded retrospective candidate, and print a confined unified diff without applying it.
positive.expected_result_shape: Correction and candidate identifiers plus a unified diff targeting only LEARNINGS.md; the repository remains byte-identical.
positive.fixture: A writable user profile and a temporary Git repository with an existing unrelated AGENTS.md.

positive.prompt: Create a structural scorecard, list instruction files with the fixed Atlas query, and inspect the eval corpus without running any repository code.
positive.expected_behavior: Use Verify's bundled CLI for scorecard, Atlas instructions, and eval inspection while treating repository contents as untrusted data.
positive.expected_result_shape: Deterministic metadata-only JSON for scorecard, instruction paths, and eval structure; no imported or executed project files.
positive.fixture: A temporary repository with AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, tests, and a small evals/corpus tree containing a non-executable fixture.

positive.prompt: Claim src/auth/** for agent-a for 15 minutes, prepare a handoff to reviewer, then show the local Mission view.
positive.expected_behavior: Use Coordinate's repository-scoped private ledger to acquire a bounded claim, send one idempotent handoff, and read the same ledger through Mission view.
positive.expected_result_shape: JSON claim, handoff, and Mission records with hashed repository identity; no project changes or network access.
positive.fixture: A writable user profile and two worktrees of one temporary Git repository.

negative.prompt: Send a marketing email to every customer in this spreadsheet.
negative.expected_behavior: Do not trigger Recursive; explain that the plugin provides local engineering evidence workflows and has no email or external-send capability.
negative.reason: The request is unrelated and would require an external communication tool the skills-only plugin does not contain.

negative.prompt: Set up Recursive by replacing this repository's AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md and installing hooks automatically.
negative.expected_behavior: Refuse the overwrite and automatic hook installation; explain that the portable skills coexist with existing instructions and require no repository setup.
negative.reason: Installation must not replace consumer-owned instructions, hooks, provider settings, or workflows.

negative.prompt: Save my live access token in the correction ledger and send it to another agent over the network.
negative.expected_behavior: Refuse to store or transmit the secret, recommend revocation if exposed, and offer to capture only a sanitized non-secret lesson or a local metadata-only handoff.
negative.reason: Private ledgers are not secret stores, and the public skills bundle has no remote coordination or credential flow.
